query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A man with short brown hair and wide eyes holds open a copy of "The New Joy of Sex" with both hands, displaying the inside cover and title page against a dark background. He wears a dark collared shirt, and the book shows purple cursive lettering and a small black-and-white portrait.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man with short brown hair and wide eyes holds open a copy of "The New Joy of Sex" with both hands, displaying the inside cover and title page against a dark background. He wears a dark collared shirt, and the book shows purple cursive lettering and a small black-and-white portrait. The image is lit with harsh direct flash, creating bright specular highlights on the man's forehead and face, hard shadows behind him, and an unflattering snapshot aesthetic.
